summary: Tested per-product IVA price_label field (backend round-trip) and frontend IVA checkboxes + Ritaglia crop button in both /app/upload and /app/products edit dialog, plus catalog preview lowercase label rendering. All backend + frontend flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CatalogCreate.jsx is very large (>1350 lines) - consider splitting ProductCard renderer into its own module for maintainability.
In edit dialog (ProductManage.jsx), 'crop-image-btn'/'edit-image-crop' logic correctly hides when no image_path; verified with product having no image.
seed_data_creation: Created test products via UI: TEST_FE_pl_plus (edited to price_label=included). Backend pytest creates/cleans TEST_pl_* products.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend: pytest test_price_label.py covers create with '', 'included', 'plus', PUT round-trip, and default when field missing (5/5 passed). Frontend UI verified: (1) /app/upload IVA radio group mutex works, POST body carries price_label; (2) crop-image-btn hidden pre-upload (correct); (3) /app/products edit dialog preselects saved price_label, mutex works, PUT persists (verified via /api/products fetch after save); (4) catalog preview /app/catalog renders 'iva inclusa' and '+ iva' spans based on per-product label. edit-image-crop was not tested with an actual image present because existing test products had no image; code inspection confirms it's rendered under `{editing.image_path && ...}` block with data-testid='edit-image-crop'.
